item.title: Market Regime: 🟢 Recovery
item.description:
This is an automated market signal summary for informational purposes only. It is not financial advice.
Risk commentary: Recovery persists but remains vulnerable to growth/inflation surprises and elevated oil volatility. Market breadth is improving, but elevated VIX and mid-level OVX signal ongoing hedging and commodity-driven uncertainty. Watch rate-sensitive sectors and mortgage conditions for signs risk appetite could roll over.
Market summary: - Regime: Recovery (🟢) - SPY: 704.08, above 200-day MA 667.31 — bullish trend (price > ma200) - QQQ: 644.33, above 100-day MA 611.57 — tech leadership intact - ARKK (3-month): -3.62% — modest underperformance among innovation names - VIX: 19.5 — elevated relative to quiet markets, indicating persistent volatility/hedging demand - TNX (10y yield): 4.3% — higher yield backdrop; supports financials, pressures duration assets - OVX: 85.57 (regime: mid) — oil volatility elevated; watch commodity risk transmission - Mortgage rate: unknown; condition: Unknown — explicitly unknown/unspecified in snapshot - Other conditions: If unchanged, overall conditions are stable - Data source: Raw data available in /data

item.title: Market Regime: 🟢 Recovery
item.description:
This is an automated market signal summary for informational purposes only. It is not financial advice.
Risk commentary: Recovery momentum looks intact but not without frictions—equities are above key averages and vol is elevated, while rates remain relatively high. That mix supports continued risk-on positioning but increases sensitivity to growth or rate surprises; downside could be sharper if volatility or yields spike.
Market summary: - SPY: 708.72, trading above the 200-day MA (666.92) — trend: bullish/stable - QQQ: 646.79, above the 100-day MA (611.18) — tech participation supports recovery - ARKK: three-month change +11% — small but positive active-growth signal - VIX: 19.5 — elevated vs. historical lows but not crisis-level; implies caution - TNX (10-yr yield): 4.26% — materially higher than recent years; rate sensitivity remains a market risk - OVX: 85.57 (regime: mid) — oil volatility elevated, warrants watch for commodity-driven inflation moves - Mortgage: rate 6.3%, condition: Neutral — borrowing costs are high versus prior cycles but currently stable - Overall: market in Recovery (🟢); conditions largely stable but susceptible to volatility or yield-driven reversals
Raw data available in /data.

item.title: Market Regime: 🟢 Recovery
item.description:
This is an automated market signal summary for informational purposes only. It is not financial advice.
Risk commentary: Recovery-phase optimism is intact but uneven: equity momentum is positive while volatility and commodity-focused indicators signal pockets of elevated risk. Monitor growth-sensitive sectors and rate-sensitive assets—rising yields and elevated oil volatility could dent sentiment if they accelerate.
Market summary: - Regime: Recovery (🟢) - SPY: 708.72, above 200‑day MA 666.92 — bullish trend/positive breadth - QQQ: 646.79, above 100‑day MA 611.18 — tech leadership intact - ARKK: 3‑month change +0.11 (11%) — active growth exposure recovering - VIX: 18.87 — moderate volatility, stable for now - TNX (10‑yr yield): 4.26% — relatively elevated; watch for further tightening pressure on rate‑sensitive sectors - OVX: 73.79 (regime: mid) — oil volatility elevated, potential risk to cyclical inflation expectations - Mortgage rate: unknown; condition: Unknown — explicitly unavailable in snapshot - Other conditions: overall conditions stable unless yields or oil volatility trend higher - Raw data available in /data

item.title: Market Regime: 🟢 Recovery
item.description:
This is an automated market signal summary for informational purposes only. It is not financial advice.
Risk commentary: Recovery momentum is intact but uneven. Volatility is low-to-moderate and yields remain elevated, supporting rotation into cyclical and growth leadership while leaving rates-sensitive sectors vulnerable. Monitor spikes in oil volatility (OVX) and any pick-up in VIX as triggers that could quickly tighten financial conditions.
Market summary: - SPY: 710.14, above 200-day MA (666.48) — bullish trend, stable - QQQ: 648.85, above 100-day MA (610.62) — growth confirmation - ARKK: three-month change -3.0% — modest underperformance vs. broader market - VIX: 17.48 — low-to-moderate volatility, conditions stable - TNX (10-yr yield): 4.26% — elevated yields, supportive of value/cyclicals, headwind for duration - OVX: 69.01, regime: mid — oil volatility elevated; monitor for commodity-driven shocks - Mortgage rate: 6.3%, condition: Neutral — mortgage environment unchanged/neutral - Raw data available at /data

item.title: Market Regime: 🟢 Recovery
item.description:
This is an automated market signal summary for informational purposes only. It is not financial advice.
Risk commentary: Market tone is cautiously constructive — equities are in recovery but volatility and rate levels keep gains vulnerable to shocks. Elevated oil volatility (OVX) and a mid-range VIX suggest risk is being priced conservatively; higher real yields and sticky mortgage rates could cap consumer/ housing sensitivity if inflation re-accelerates. Monitor sentiment and flows for signs the recovery broadens or fades.
Market summary: - SPY: 701.66, comfortably above its 200‑day MA (666.01) — upward/ recovery trend intact and stable. - QQQ: 640.47 vs 100‑day MA 609.98 — tech leadership confirming part of the recovery. - ARKK (3‑month): -5.6% — thematic/alpha strategies lagging the broader rebound. - VIX: 17.94 — moderate volatility, stable in the current regime. - TNX (10‑yr yield): 4.32% — yields elevated; keeps discounting tighter financial conditions relative to pre‑recovery lows. - OVX: 73.04, regime: mid — crude volatility remains high, a tail risk for equities and inflation expectations. - Mortgage rate: 6.3%, condition: Neutral — housing finance costs remain elevated but currently stable. - Systemic note: raw data and snapshot are available in /data.
